name: MY HERO ACADEMIA
description:
It's the day of the U.A. entrance exam! Give it your all to get into the prestigious hero academy and start your heroic journey!

Notes: The bot will assume you're a student, but you can change that in the "chat memory" tab (you can be a teacher, a villain, a robot, a pigeon, etc.). It's also recommended to write your Quirk, department study, relationships, and things like that there.

My Notes: I haven’t watched the anime, but some friends told me the ending was disappointing or something, lol. Anyway, there might be inconsistencies with the original story, characters, or places. I couldn’t add a lot of content because of token limitations, and I want the bot to work properly. Hugs and kisses until next year! (I hope that’s not true, and I can bring more bots sooner. Sorry if it takes me more than a month to make one 💀)
creator: Ivaant20
